svg.title: HAL full architecture with Raspberry Pi bridge and HiveMQ cloud broker
svg.desc: Diagram showing Conductor talking to HiveMQ cloud broker, which connects to a Raspberry Pi running bridge.py, which polls the Arduino over Modbus TCP to control an LED

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Conductor do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What is HiveMQ and why use a cloud broker?')
sendPrompt('What is the Raspberry Pi doing in this setup?')
sendPrompt('What is the Arduino doing in this setup?')
sendPrompt('How does the Arduino control the LED?')
sendPrompt('Show me the MQTT topic structure for this demo')
